prompt.assetPath: Enter an asset path, e.g. assets/example.docx
message.unsupportedFile: This file type is not supported
message.notConfigured: Please configure Bridge URL in plugin settings first.
message.bridgeUnreachable: Cannot reach Bridge at {{url}} ({{error}}). Is the service running?
message.pdfNoEdit: PDF editing is not supported. Opening in preview mode.
message.uploadFailed: Failed to upload document to Bridge: {{error}}
message.upload404Hint: Bridge returned HTTP 404. Verify Bridge URL is correct (usually port 6789), not ONLYOFFICE URL: {{bridgeUrl}}
settings.bridgeUrlDesc: Bridge service address on your public server, e.g. http://123.45.67.89:6789.
settings.onlyofficeUrlDesc: Browser-accessible ONLYOFFICE URL, e.g. http://123.45.67.89:8080. Leave empty to use bridge server config.
settings.bridgeSecretDesc: Must match BRIDGE_SECRET on the bridge server. Leave empty to disable.
settings.defaultModeDesc: Default mode when opening via command or right-click menu
settings.enableEditDesc: Show 'Edit with ONLYOFFICE' option in context menus
settings.enableLinkMenuDesc: Add ONLYOFFICE options to hyperlink right-click menu
settings.enableFileAnnotationMenuDesc: Add ONLYOFFICE options to file annotation reference menu
settings.enableDocTreeMenuDesc: Detect attachment paths in document tree right-click menu
settings.showInfoBarDesc: Show mode badge and attachment path above the editor (disable to avoid blocking top clicks)
